message:
feat(ui): add rating display to prompt cards

Integrate RatingDisplay component into PromptCard to show user ratings
alongside token count. Layout updated to accommodate both metrics in
a horizontal arrangement.

Changes:
- Import RatingDisplay component from ratings module
- Add compact rating display next to token count
- Restructure token count into its own flex container for cleaner layout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
